name: Germany
avoid: Oktoberfest if avoiding crowds (or embrace it!)

cities.name: Berlin
cities.notes: Brandenburg Gate, Museum Island, Berlin Wall and legendary club scene

cities.name: Munich
cities.notes: Marienplatz Glockenspiel, English Garden, BMW Museum and Oktoberfest

cities.name: Hamburg
cities.notes: Speicherstadt warehouse district, Miniatur Wunderland and fish market

cities.name: Dresden
cities.notes: Baroque Frauenkirche, Zwinger palace and Elbe valley vineyard views

cities.name: Heidelberg
cities.notes: Romantic castle ruins above the Neckar with Germany's oldest university

cities.name: Cologne
cities.notes: Twin-spired Gothic cathedral, Roman history and vibrant Carnival
